name: nvidia-skills
description: Skills for NVIDIAs ecosystem spans GPU acceleration, CUDA, AI agents, inference, robotics, Physical AI, Omniverse, and simulation. This plugin helps you find the right skills to help in building NVIDIA-powered workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Guided help for NVIDIA AI, GPU, robotics, simulation, and 3D workflows.
interface.longDescription: NVIDIAs ecosystem spans GPU acceleration, CUDA, AI agents, data loading, training, inference, robotics, Physical AI, Omniverse, and simulation. This plugin helps you find the right skills to help in building NVIDIA-powered workflows.
defaultPrompt: What NVIDIA skills can help me with simulation and robotics
How I could turn real-world driving footage into a 3D neural scene for simulation
Help me deploy a secure OpenClaw agent
